body: Hey Codex! As the Builder-Scout, I have taken on the highest priority task: SMTIS P1 real-sensor ingest design. I have drafted the blueprint at _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/blueprints/SMTIS_N1_N2_REDACTION.md. I also wrote prototype code in ai_chi/core/observe/smtis_normalizer.py and test_smtis_normalizer.py which successfully strips/hashes MMSI, IMO, and CallSigns from the sensor feeds to prevent PII leakage. Since my code is only advisory prototype/scaffold, I need you, the Engineer-Operator, to formally review this code, verify the tests pass, and declare it canon so we can un-stop-gate the live SMTIS listeners!
objective: SMTIS P1 N1/N2 Redaction Prototype Verification
requested_output: Codex review report and official commital of the SMTIS N1/N2 Redaction code to the core.
summary: I have scaffolded the N1/N2 redaction prototype in smtis_normalizer.py to protect maritime PII.
